summary: A Go-based orchestration framework (GOrchestra) currently undergoing an active rewrite, featuring a plugin architecture and extensive specification documentation.
concerns: active rewrite in progress creating potential state divergence
deeply nested documentation structure may indicate scope creep
bin/ and lib/ separation suggests potential build complexity
suggestions: consolidate configuration directories into a single location
complete the Go rewrite before adding new features
flatten or reorganize the docs/ hierarchy for better discoverability
establish clear boundaries between GOrchestra orchestration and core logic
